tissue: Adipose tissue thermogenesis contributes to energy balance...
cell_type: C4orf3 was highly expressed in beige adipocytes...
disease_state: obese individuals with type 2 diabetes relative to non-obese healthy people.
sample_source: human subcutaneous adipose tissues from people classified as being normal weight...
age: At 20 weeks of age, echo-MRI scans found that CRISPRi-C4orf3 mice exhibited significantly higher adiposity...
cell_line: full-length C4orf3 and these mutants were then ectopically expressed together with SERCA2b in HEK293 cells.
strain: To develop Ucp1 x C4orf3 DKO mice (DKO mice), the above-described CRISPRi-C4orf3 mice were crossed with Ucp1 KO mice (Strain # 003124, The Jackson Laboratory).
